creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

From the submitter: 

I am the maintainer of this port, and I submitted this PR.  Due to 
the ports freeze, the snapshot update has become increasingly more 
out of date.  Also, I am not happy with the way the port handles 
the distfile. 

So, I would like to withdraw this PR and submit one later with 
a more current snapshot and streamlined distfile handling. 

Bud Dodson
